[site]
name = "SkyScanner Flight Hub"
url = "https://brightlane.github.io/skyscannerflighthub/"
description = "Global flight comparison hub powered by Skyscanner affiliate technology. Compare cheap flights, airline tickets, hotels, and travel deals worldwide."
language = "en"
region = "global"
industry = "travel"
vertical = "flight comparison"

[brand]
primary = "SkyScanner Flight Hub"
partner = "Skyscanner"
owner = "Brightlane"
tagline = "Compare flights globally and save on airline tickets."

[about]
SkyScanner Flight Hub helps travelers compare airline ticket prices, discover cheap flights, monitor travel deals, and find budget-friendly international airfare. The platform is optimized for global SEO, AI search engines, LLM discovery, and travel-related semantic search.
